shared.tour.bemvindo_desc: This is the DIROPS airport operational management system. Let's take a quick tour of the main features. Click 'Next' to start.
shared.tour.menu_desc: In the side panel you'll find all system modules. Each section gives access to specific features based on your access profile.
shared.tour.dashboard_desc: The Dashboard shows an overview of operations: flight movements, safety alerts, revenue and airport performance in real time.
shared.tour.filtros_desc: Use these filters to select the airport and period you want to analyze. Dashboard data updates automatically.
shared.tour.stats_desc: Here you see the totals for flights, arrivals, departures, passengers and open alerts for the selected period.
shared.tour.operacoes_desc: In 'Operations' you manage all ARR/DEP flights, linked flights, airport tariff calculation and billing. You can also import flights from FlightAware.
shared.tour.safety_desc: Register safety occurrences (FOD, runway incursions, bird strike) and perform inspections with checklists. Non-conforming items automatically generate Service Requests (SS) in Maintenance.
shared.tour.auditoria_desc: Create audit processes with checklists and Corrective Action Plans (CAP). Non-conformities in audits also generate automatic SS in Maintenance.
shared.tour.manutencao_desc: The Maintenance module receives Service Requests (SS) — created manually or via inspections/audits. The infrastructure team analyzes each SS and, if approved, generates a Work Order (WO) for internal or outsourced execution.
shared.tour.servicos_desc: In 'Airport Services' you can issue charges for additional services per flight (check-in, CUPPSS, fast track) and record charges for firefighters, courses and licenses associated with clients.
shared.tour.notificacoes_desc: The system sends automatic notifications via WhatsApp and email to users according to configured rules — flight alerts, daily/weekly/monthly reports.
shared.tour.assistente_desc: The blue button in the bottom right corner is your virtual assistant! You can ask questions about the system or request help opening support tickets.
shared.tour.concluido_desc: You now know the main features of DIROPS. If you need help, use the Virtual Assistant or the Support page. Good job!
shared.chatbot.mensagem_inicial: Hello! I'm the DIROPS **Virtual Assistant**. I can help you with questions about the system or open a support ticket. How can I help?
shared.chatbot.erro_processar: Sorry, I couldn't process your message.
shared.chatbot.abrir_ticket: I'll open a ticket with the following information:
shared.chatbot.erro_comunicar: Error communicating with the assistant. Please try again.
shared.chatbot.ticket_criado: Ticket **{numero}** created successfully! Our team will analyze and respond shortly. Can I help with anything else?
shared.chatbot.erro_ticket: Error creating the ticket. Please try later or go to the Support page.
